evals.prompt: I really want to finally understand linear algebra — I'm an adult who half-remembers matrices from school and I want the intuition, not just formulas. Can you help me actually learn it?
evals.expected_output: Drafts a structured ordered course outline, then scaffolds the minimal-track single-page learning app with all four pillars.
assertions: Produces a runnable single-page web app (React/Vite), not a one-off script or static HTML page
Includes a structured course path with per-lesson progress/unlock that persists across reloads
Includes a context-aware AI tutor that is primed per lesson
Implements the select-to-ask annotation interaction (highlight a span -> ask -> inline persisted thread)
The generated app builds and its unit tests pass

evals.prompt: Build me an interactive study app for the French Revolution where I can highlight any part of an explanation and ask a follow-up question about just that bit.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the select-to-ask learning-system shape; builds the full system from templates with the highlight interaction front and center.
assertions: Produces a runnable single-page web app (React/Vite), not a one-off script or static HTML page
Implements the explicitly-requested select-to-ask interaction (highlight -> floating ask -> inline thread) using the reusable component
Includes a structured course path with progress/unlock that persists across reloads
Includes a context-aware AI tutor that is primed per lesson
The generated app builds and its unit tests pass

evals.prompt: I'm teaching myself home cooking from zero. I want something that gives me a real path to follow, an AI that teaches each step and remembers where I am, and that I can come back to without losing progress.
evals.expected_output: Defaults to minimal track; ordered cook-first course, context-aware tutor, persistence, select-to-ask; resources real and marked, not fabricated.
assertions: Produces a runnable single-page web app (React/Vite), not a one-off script or static HTML page
Includes a structured course path with progress/unlock that persists across reloads
Includes a context-aware AI tutor that is primed per lesson
Implements the select-to-ask annotation interaction (highlight -> ask -> inline persisted thread)
Recommended resources are real and clearly marked as suggestions to verify, with no fabricated precise URLs
The generated app builds and its unit tests pass
